evidence.scientific_clarity: Scatter + OLS fit with R²=0.877 annotation clearly shows Chinchilla-style scaling law; OursModel point labeled; axes log-scaled as requested.
evidence.typography: pdf.fonttype=42 and ps.fonttype=42 set in rcParams; sans-serif font family; font sizes 7–8 pt (Nature-style); no DejaVu Sans default visible.
evidence.palette: Blue (#4878CF) for models, red (#E84040) for OLS fit (directional), orange (#F5A623) for emphasis point; colorblind-distinguishable hues; no green/red ambiguity.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout with pad=0.5; 3.5×3.0 inch figure; annotation box and legend positioned in upper-right without overlap; axes range matches data extent well.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Legend overlaps annotation box region (both anchored to upper-right at bbox_to_anchor=(0.97,0.72) vs text at (0.97,0.97)); caption matches figure content and numbers; minor risk of crowding.
evidence.vector_fidelity: Script saves figure.pdf with pdf.fonttype=42 ensuring editable/selectable text in real vector PDF; SVG also saved with default svg.fonttype.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, gen_figure.py all present and non-trivial.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption explains axes (log10 scale), what each element represents, and includes specific numerical findings: slope=-0.0449, intercept=0.6209, R²=0.877, and OursModel coordinates.

overall_strengths: Clean Nature-style figure with proper font settings (pdf.fonttype=42), tight layout, and well-chosen colorblind-safe palette.
Caption is quantitatively complete, reporting slope, intercept, R², and the exact coordinates of the OursModel highlight point.
overall_weaknesses: Legend and annotation text box are both anchored in the upper-right corner, creating a risk of visual overlap or crowding depending on rendering resolution.
SVG export does not explicitly set svg.fonttype=0 (or 'none') to guarantee editable text in SVG format, though PDF vector fidelity is properly handled.
